Party E submitted a revised LOI, along with financing support, from Party F, at a price of $23.81 per share

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: On August 1, 2016, Party D submitted a revised LOI at a price of $24.00 per share and Party E submitted a revised LOI, along with financing support, from Party F, at a price of $23.81 per share.

bid_claims.quote_text: G&W submitted a revised LOI to acquire the Company for a price of $25.00 per share in cash

event_claims.description: The Transaction Committee authorized GHF to contact Party A and other potential buyers to determine their interest in a change in control transaction.
event_claims.quote_text: The Transaction Committee authorized GHF to contact Party A as well as other potential buyers to determine their level of interest in a change in control transaction.

event_claims.description: GHF contacted 11 potential strategic buyers, including Party A, and 18 potential financial buyers during the week of March 28, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: During the week of March 28, 2016, in accordance with the Transaction Committee’s directives, representatives of GHF contacted 11 potential strategic buyers (including Party A) and 18 potential financial buyers.

event_claims.description: G&W submitted a revised LOI to acquire the Company for $25.00 per share in cash.
event_claims.quote_text: On the morning of August 12, 2016, following a discussion between representatives of BMO and G&W in which G&W indicated it would be submitting a revised LOI, G&W submitted a revised LOI to acquire the Company for a price of $25.00 per share in cash, which excluded the previously proposed CVR, together with mark-ups of the merger agreement and the voting agreement.

participation_count_claims.quote_text: Between May 19, 2016 and June 1, 2016, the Company received nine written indications of interest (“IOIs”) from potential buyers
In late July 2016, the Company received six LOIs with offer prices per share ranging from $19.20 to $24.00
